eclipticseasons.configuration.LowLightGr: Greenhouse Failure Chance in Low Light
eclipticseasons.configuration.title: Settings
eclipticseasons.configuration.SnowInFenc: Snow in Fences Only During Snowfall
eclipticseasons.configuration.ForceChunk: Update Chunks on Snow Melt Only
eclipticseasons.configuration.ShouldInit: Initialize Snow in Extreme Cold Biomes
eclipticseasons.configuration.MonthOffse: Shifts the displayed month index. Positive values move months forward. Does not affect solar term logic.
Shifts calendar days relative to solar terms. Used to align solar term day 0 (e.g., Beginning of Spring) with calendar dates.
eclipticseasons.configuration.RenderedSn: Renders snow-covered overlays on most surface blocks after snowfall
Allows vanilla snow accumulation and ice formation in non-cold biomes during freezing weather
Displays additional debug information for solar terms, biomes, weather, and related systems
eclipticseasons.configuration.NaturalSou: Enables ambient environmental and seasonal sounds. Can also be customized through resource packs
eclipticseasons.configuration.ExtraSnowL: Renders an additional snow layer on top of full blocks when using snow-covered models
eclipticseasons.configuration.ExtraSnowD: Provides snow-covered models and definitions for more vanilla blocks. Requires restart
eclipticseasons.configuration.FrozenWate: Experimental feature that renders a thin ice layer on river surfaces during snowfall
eclipticseasons.configuration.SpringGras: Affects temperate biomes. Grasslands will grow short grass and wildflowers in spring, tall grass in summer, then gradually wither through autumn and winter
Collect pumpkin seeds to prepare for the next autumn
advancement.eclipticseasons.block_in_cop: Some blocks that affect humidity could be placed in the grate—beware, for they may transform with time or need warmth to fade into vapor~
advancement.eclipticseasons.copper_grate: Maybe something can be placed in the grate to alter the environment?
advancement.eclipticseasons.decorate_oak: Right-click a Hanging Sign with the Seasonal Prayer Scroll to turn it into a Seasonal Quest Sign, and complete endless quests to earn Greenhouse Essences
Build a sealed space that traps warmth and air—just like nature's cheat code!
advancement.eclipticseasons.greenhouse_c: Power up your greenhouse by placing a Greenhouse Essence into its heart
Install a Greenhouse Core Container, then grow what nature says you shouldn't
Do not walk directly under the sun in hot communities during the summer afternoon. If necessary, bring heat-resistant gear or take ice and snow to cool down
advancement.eclipticseasons.quest.desc: Complete seasonal quests to earn Greenhouse Essence rewards
advancement.eclipticseasons.root.desc: Span a year with twenty-four solar terms
advancement.eclipticseasons.seasonal_pra: Craft a Seasonal Prayer Scroll to obtain Greenhouse Essences
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_bread: After hard work, enjoy a hearty meal~
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_harve: Harvest wheat in the lingering spring
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_hay.d: Craft hay bales to store your harvest
Collect wheat seeds to prepare for the next spring
advancement.eclipticseasons.spring_start: Plant wheat as all things grow
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_glist: Craft a glistering melon slice. What is this?
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_harve: Cool off with watermelons in the scorching summer
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_melon: Can anyone eat a whole watermelon?
Collect watermelon seeds to prepare for the next summer
advancement.eclipticseasons.summer_start: Prepare to enjoy watermelons in the heat of summer~
Let's celebrate a year of good harvest~
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_campf: Snowy night, warm fire, and me
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_carpe: Oh dear, don't catch a cold
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_harve: Collect powder snow using a cauldron when it snows
advancement.eclipticseasons.winter_start: Get ready to grab a broom and sweep the snow~
effect.eclipticseasons.heat_stroke.descr: The scorching heat is unbearable, and your vision gradually blurs.
info.eclipticseasons.bone_meal.failure: Cannot accelerate growth under current conditions.
info.eclipticseasons.calendar.use: §7§oPlace on a wall; sneak to switch calendar display modes
info.eclipticseasons.environment.season_: The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
Cool breeze arrives, autumn fills the sky.
The old year has passed, snow fills the door.
Fileds in bloom, spring holds its breath.
Winds wither white grass, sky dim and dark.
Frost surprises the evening, cold lights the forest tips.
The sense of autumn wanes, and chill begins to rise.
With the winter rain, the weather grows much colder.
Swallows return as spring renews the land.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
Soft rain falls unseen, as birdsong fills the air.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
The color of warm summer has faded.
Snow fills the world, as if trees were blooming with pear blossoms.
Severe cold in the depth of winter.
Summer warmth insufficient, hints of autumn.
Cold wind roars fiercely, snow falls thick.
Cold winter wanes, spring is still faint.
It's just as warm as it is cold. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
The aura of winter is getting thicker and thicker.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
Dust fills the air, and not a drop of rain in sight.
The rivers runs bare and dry.
Dust veils the fields. Green leaves wither.
A weary breeze, the sun rests upon the hills.
The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
Winds dry the grass, leaves droop low.
Heat departs, yet autumn’s breath remains.
Summer heat fades, autumn rains near.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
Dark skies hang, soft wind and wet air.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
Sparse cold rains, leisurely tapping leaves.
Insect calls stir, thunder rumbles near.
North winds chill, occasional snow falls.
Maple leaves red, chilly winds rise.
Soft spring rains, flowers bloom full.
It's just warm enough. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
Heat withdraws, new coolness follows rain.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
Rain falls for days, and clear skies are rare.
Heavy raindrops fall. Streams swell into rivers.
Rain pours from the sky. Thunders roar like dragons.
Heavy humidity lingers, and the heat is unbearable.
Rains grow sparse. Winds gradually calm.
The world steams, and all trees thrive.
Moisture hangs heavy, and the heat is suffocating.
info.eclipticseasons.environment.solar_t: The daytime decreases when the nighttime increases.
The color of summer has faded.
Spring coming back, all things awaken.
The last spring has gone and the summer is coming.
The aura of autumn is getting thicker and thicker.
The summer heat has been swept away as the autumn rains are ready.
Swallows return, and pear blossoms wither.
Winds graze the field. Insects chirp.
It rains noiselessly, but cuckoo crows.
Winds died away, but icy coldness still.
Snow begins to fall and decorate the world.
Severe cold in the depth of winter.
Crops are growing, maturing and waiting for the harvest.
With the winter rain, the weather grows much colder.
It's just as warm as it is cold. Day and night are as long as each other.
Oh, the longest day is coming.
Cool winds graze. White dew gathers.
Shadows become longer. The endless long night comes.
info.eclipticseasons.greenhouse_core.eff: Boosts %2$s crops within %1$s blocks in a greenhouse
Obtained by completing %1$s advancements or quests
info.eclipticseasons.seasonal_prayer_scr: Activate the Greenhouse Core to perform a seasonal ritual, or a hanging sign as a seasonal quest sign
info.eclipticseasons.snow_cauldron.extra: §7§oUse a shovel to obtain Snow Balls
patchouli_books.eclipticseasons.seasons_: Each season leaves a mark — the "Chronicle of the Seasons" records them all.
task.eclipticseasons.clean_snow.desc: Applied to snow-covered blocks from Ecliptic Season
